message:
refactor(core): migrate search_bridge RuntimeBuilder to runtime_compat

Replaces 2 inline tokio::runtime::Builder instances in search_bridge.rs
production code with RuntimeBuilder from runtime_compat. Also adds
CompatRuntime import for block_on trait method.

Remaining tokio in search_bridge: spawn_blocking (needs JoinHandle for
abort), select! macro — both require deeper API additions.

All 12,950 lib tests pass, zero clippy warnings.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
